content_body:
This is our 4th (?) stay in the Blue Ridge Mountain cabins. Again we had a very relaxing, enjoyable time together. To the owners we say thank you for being such pleasant people to work with.

We came to take time away from our work in ministry and I must say that it was a much needed rest. My favorite part of this area of cabins was watching the sun rise so beautifully over the trees each morning as I spent time just sitting and praying to the Lord - how faithful He is - just as sure as the rising of the Sun! 

We also loved going down to the river and spending quiet time in the gazebo swinging - it was so quiet and peaceful - it felt like a place and time time just for us! We were blessed!
title: It Felt Like It Was A Place Just For Us!
